name: dolftech-hrms-backend
description: Dolf HRMS API — Alembic migration scripts

scripts.build: python -c "import os; assert os.getenv('DATABASE_URL') or os.getenv('POSTGRES_URL'), 'Set DATABASE_URL (or POSTGRES_URL) in Vercel Project Settings for Build and Runtime'; from app.core.config import settings; print('Migrating:', settings.sync_database_url.split('@')[-1])" && python -m alembic upgrade head && python -m scripts.seed
